heading: Omitted
label: 1134 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which exempted funds distributed under the provisions of this subchapter from Federal and State income taxes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 89–660, § 480 Stat. 911Oct. 14, 1966
